Tragacanth is a type of plant, specifically a type of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The health benefits of Tragacanth include its use as a demulcent, soothing digestive issues and protecting mucous membranes. The bioactive constituents of Tragacanth include mucilage, which is a complex mixture of polysaccharides, as well as other compounds such as galactomannans and arabinogalactans.
